title: CDIF Provenance profile
description: NOT merely prov:wasGeneratedBy present — a minimal prov:Activity with prov:used is already declared in cdifCore. The cdifProv class is marked by a dual-typed prov:Activity + schema:Action carrying properties beyond prov:used (agent, object, result, startTime, location, actionProcess, ...). The validity gate is the cdifProvActivity content shapes.
